name: china_osm_v301_commitments_all
short_name: AidData China Finance v3.01: All Commitments
title: Monetary value of Chinese ODA and OOF-financed development projects (GeoGCDF v3.0.1)
description: Monetary commitment value of Chinese ODA- and OOF-financed projects from AidData's Geospatial Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset v3.0.1. These constant 2021 USD values are associated with projects from the dataset for which locations were found using OpenStreetMap (OSM).

processing_options.description: total commitment value (2021 USD) per unit of analysis
total count of pixels per unit of analysis

citation: Goodman, S., Zhang, S., Malik, A.A., Parks, B.C., Hall, J. 2024. AidData's Geospatial Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset. Scientific Data. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-024-03341-w
